ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the employee works */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of employment (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating given during the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review took place */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee to whom the salary record belongs */,
  "current_salary" REAL /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "future_salary" REAL /* Projected future salary of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary becomes effective */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., hourly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the bonus */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bonus awarded */,
  "bonus_date" TEXT /* Date the bonus was awarded */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (e.g., performance-based, signing bonus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee to whom the salary history record belongs */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount during the change event */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change (e.g., promotion, cost-of-living adjustment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Employee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team's responsibilities */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-member mapping */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review cycle */,
  "cycle_name" TEXT /* Name of the review cycle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the review cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the review cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)
